paper_title: Automatic Security Evaluation and (Related-key) Differential Characteristic Search: Application to SIMON, PRESENT, LBlock, DES(L) and Other Bit-oriented Block Ciphers
obtained_claim: A concrete LP was emitted for the 12-round lower-bound unit and accepted by HiGHS. A 60-second local run produced a feasible objective 38 and dual bound 1, so the current local evidence only brackets the instantiated 12-round objective as 1 <= N12 <= 38. A remote execution lane on serverC is now confirmed, but that host currently lacks a MILP solver stack
mismatch_notes: The emitted model is solver-readable, the current local probe is not paper-conclusive, and the newly confirmed remote host serverC does not yet have highs/gurobi/cbc/glpsol/scip or matching Python MILP packages installed
next_action: Calibrate against smaller published PRESENT-80 rows from Table 4, then choose between local longer runs and explicit MILP provisioning on serverC
